/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -rdynamic CMakeFiles/MyoroPlayer.dir/src/App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyoroPlayer.dir/src/Controls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyoroPlayer.dir/src/Frame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyoroPlayer.dir/src/MenuBar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyoroPlayer.dir/src/SongList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyoroPlayer.dir/src/UpdateSlider.cpp.o -o MyoroPlayer   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -pthread /usr/local/lib/libwx_gtk3u_media-3.1.a /usr/local/lib/libwx_gtk3u_core-3.1.a /usr/local/lib/libwx_baseu-3.1.a -lgstvideo-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgthread-2.0 -pthread -lX11 -lXxf86vm -lSM -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lnotify -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lXtst -lpangoft2-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lfontconfig -lfreetype -lwxscintilla-3.1 -lexpat -lpcre2-32 -lpng -ljpeg -ltiff -lz -lsecret-1 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lcurl -lm -no-pie
